name: Octagons
author: R. Wayne Schmittberger (1992) / AGP port
description: R. Wayne Schmittberger's Hex-like connection game from New Rules for Classic Games (1992). On an 8x8 board of halved octagons with 49 small squares in the interstices, a turn colours either ONE half-octagon or TWO squares. Red joins North to South, Blue West to East; spaces sharing a side connect, corner spaces serve both adjacent sides, and draws are impossible. Pie rule after Red's first move. The characteristic double move creates tactics (semi-squares, dog's legs) unlike any other connection game (Abstract Games #7).
